Headline: #94 California Temporary Reroute at California/Fullerton
ShortDescription: #94 California buses are rerouted via California, Fullerton, Western, Diversey, and over regular route, due to street blockage near California/Fullerton.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#94 California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via California, Fullerton, Western, Diversey, and over regular route, due to street blockage near California/Fullerton.

Allow extra travel time.
